description: StackScript update. With confirm the id rejection agrees; the at-least-one-editable-field requirement is now enforced in both languages (Python gained Go's check). Success PUTs only the changed field.

cases.name: rejects non-positive stackscript_id
cases.expect_error: stackscript_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: requires at least one editable field
cases.expect_error: at least one editable field is required

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a StackScript in your account. Set confirm=true to proceed.
